chinese_news.title: 从二游到种田：米哈游《星布谷地》能否走出舒适圈
chinese_news.summary:
文丨小葵

编辑丨果脯

2026年，生活模拟赛道正在经历一场“神仙打架”。腾讯的《粒粒的小人国》用微观世界把玩家缩回书桌，网易的《星绘友晴天》在外太空搞起了开荒叙事，而在海外，任天堂也上线了新作《朋友收集：梦想生活》。

4月21日，米哈游的《星布谷地》开启了二测。对他们来说，首次挑战社交大DAU品类的生活模拟游戏，无疑是一次不寻常且有压力的跨界。

自《原神》大火后，米哈游就围绕游戏性做过多次尝试，如主打回合制玩法的《崩坏：星穹铁道》，强调动作的《绝区零》。而在研产品里，除了《星布谷地》，还有捉宠like产品《崩坏：因缘精灵》、大都市二游《Varsapura》（雨之城），以及至少一款尚未正式公布的3A产品。

从这些经历来看，米哈游其实并不缺乏做陌生类型新品的经验和能力，甚至每一款都能在对应赛道取得不错的成绩，《星布谷地》想来也不会太差。但特殊之处，在于过去米哈游擅长的高精度美术、强数值反馈等设计体系，可能并不适用于《星布谷地》。

《星布谷地》需要的是更细致、更抽

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 性能操控赛主机、续航全能超旗舰，「颗秒神器」一加 Ace 6 至尊版正式发布！
chinese_news.summary: 2026年4月28日，一加正式发布「颗秒神器」一加 Ace 6 至尊版。作为游戏性能旗舰最强之选，一加 Ace 6 至尊版搭载当代旗舰芯天玑9500移动平台，并独家写入一加自研芯片级游戏技术——全新一代「风驰游戏内核」，以持续满帧的165超高帧、颗秒级精准的最强触控、感官更沉浸的满配战术工具，重新定义行业最强射击游戏体验。一加 Ace 6 至尊版配备旗舰同款「冰河散热系统」、同档领先的 8600mAh 超巨量「冰川电池」 + 120W 超级闪充组合，首发自研OPPO冰川电池聚能芯片，支持IP66/IP68/IP69/IP69K满级防尘防水，并搭载超流畅更 AI 的新一代ColorOS 16，以枪神形态全面出击。同时，一加首发行业首款「触按融合」射击游戏专属手柄——「一加枪神游戏手柄」，带来区别于外挂肩键、拉伸手柄和传统手机肩键的全新操控方案，解锁新机双形态体验，为玩家打造「枪神梦想装备」。

chinese_news.title: 早期项目 | 德国宇航局工程师创业，让硬件开发进入“vibe时代”
chinese_news.summary:
“传统工业软件太难用了。”

这是Orthogonal的创始人吉洋和他身边一大批工业界同行的共同感受。

“AI时代，软件开发已经可以用Cursor做vibe coding了，而硬件设计还停留在原始社会”吉洋在接受硬氪采访时表示，达索、ANSYS等巨头构建的，是一个由高昂授权费和极陡学习曲线砌成的“高墙”，Orthogonal想做的，是把“vibe”的方式带入硬件开发。

Orthogonal创始人吉洋曾在德国宇航局（DLR）及工业界深耕了近二十年，参与过达索系统仿真工具核心功能的研发，领导了空客A350宽体客机电气系统的研发，并在库卡、宝马、西门子高速列车、中国商飞、华为、中国航空发动机集团等全球知名企业的合作项目中担任过领导或关键角色。2023年因其在科研和创业领域的贡献，被慕尼黑工业大学授予“TUM Ambassador”荣誉称号。

在他看来，AI带来的不仅是简单的效率提升，更是一次重构工业软件范式的机会，传统工具的复杂性已经成为行业发展的瓶颈。

“AI时代

chinese_news.title: 一家AI原生健康硬件公司完成近亿元融资，韶音、甘洁出手，高秉强投过｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，AI原生健康硬件公司「杉木SHANMU」近日完成近亿元A轮融资，本轮由石溪资本（兆易创新旗下战投基金）领投，韶音科技、博将资本、涌铧投资、上海天使会等多家机构联合参投，老股东甘洁教授旗下知行一号基金和万物为资本追加本轮投资。庚辛资本为本轮财务顾问。

此前公司已获得多家机构加持，包括高秉强教授、松禾资本、启赋资本、浩方创投、北大张海霞教授旗下ICANX基金等。本轮资金将用于旗下DTC消费医疗产品的上市进程、推进B端定制化模块的交付落地，以及开展国内外医疗注册证的申报工作。

家用健康检测并非新的叙事。过去二十年，血糖仪、血压计、尿酸仪早已进入家庭，但其底层逻辑从未改变：始终停留在 “用户主动发起、单点采集、切片式截面数据” 的模式。

这是一条从医院平移至家庭的执行链路，繁琐的操作流程让用户长期依从性极低，“有创伤、记不住、嫌麻烦”难以坚持使用，最终让本应发挥健康管理价值的仪器，沦为家中散落里的闲置品。

与此同时，可穿戴设备的边界也已清晰。智能

豆包将在免费模式外新增付费订阅，官方回应

近日，豆包App Store页面出现付费版本服务声明。对此，豆包官方回应称，豆包始终提供免费服务，在免费服务的基础上，豆包也在探索推出更多增值服务，相关方案细节目前还在测试阶段。

另据接近豆包的人士透露，付费功能将主要专注在复杂任务和生产力场景，如PPT生成、数据分析、影视制作等。随着模型能力持续升级，产品已经能满足越来越多的复杂高价值任务。但此类任务需消耗更多算力

chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「有三思  U  Sense」

5月4日，一个被默认为“青年专属”的日期。

但在我看来，“青年”一词从来不只和年龄挂钩，每一个还在试探人生的节拍与正轨的人，身体里都住着一位渴望力量的青年。

[1]

许多年前，我还是一个初入职场的新人，在猎头行

chinese_news.title: 豆包将在免费模式外新增付费订阅，推出三档月包/年包价格｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，近日，豆包App Store页面出现付费版本服务声明。声明称，为更好地服务专业用户，豆包将在免费版的基础上，推出包含更多增值服务的付费版本。同时，该页面还披露了三档订阅价格：标准版连续包月每月68元（连续包年688元）、加强版连续包月每月200元（连续包年2048元）、专业版连续包月每月500元（连续包年5088元）。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the US and Iran reach a peace agreement by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump administration expects Tehran response within 48 hours on key peace terms; escalation rhetoric paired with diplomatic signals suggests imminent resolution window.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Trump says Iran will be bombed at 'much higher level' if it doesn't agree to peace deal; BBC: Oil prices drop and stock markets rise after reports of deal to end Iran war

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVIDIA stock close above $150 by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Corning partnership announcement on optical fiber infrastructure for AI; AMD's Su doubled long-term forecasts on CPU demand; institutional conviction on AI capex durability rising.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Nvidia, Corning partner on massive optical fiber deal; AMD's Su explains massive forecast change as stock roars 15%

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates at least once by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: ADP private payrolls beat expectations (109k); labor market stability reduces near-term rate-cut pressure, but forward guidance diverges if recession signals emerge.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Private payrolls rose by 109,000 in April, topping expectations; narrative emphasizes 'less incentive for Fed to lower interest rates'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Uber stock outperform SPY by >10% by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CNBC highlights resilient consumer spending on rides and food delivery despite macro headwinds; Disney co-validation of consumer durability across discretionary.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Uber and Disney are seeing the same remarkable dynamic in this economy; both stocks surging on strong consumer spending signals

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Crypto infrastructure acceleration (Morgan Stanley E*Trade pilot, OpenTrade $17M raise for stablecoin RWA bridges, Samsung blockchain securities deal); institutional onramp momentum.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: Morgan Stanley takes on crypto trading rivals with E*Trade pilot; OpenTrade raises $17M; Samsung SDS wins South Korea blockchain securities deal

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Colombia mint more than 5,000 BTC using renewable energy before December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official Colombian government energy ministry statement or Colombia's national mining pool public blockchain record; Chainanalysis geolocation data
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: No market currently prices sovereign or government-backed Bitcoin mining intentions; narrative is novel and liquidity is thin despite real policy signal.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Colombia wants to mine bitcoin with surplus renewable energy; clean energy overcapacity makes this credible within 8 months

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Bank of England formally ban unhosted wallet withdrawals for UK stablecoin issuers by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Bank of England official regulation notice or UK FCA final rules register; official press release
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Stablecoin industry opposition is visible but market hasn't priced binary regulatory risk; deadline is tight (8 weeks), making it actionable.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Stablecoin industry opposes Bank of England's unhosted wallet ban; regulatory momentum on custody is accelerating globally

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Zcash (ZEC) trade above $800 at any point before September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, Coinbase, or Kraken spot price feed; any major exchange closing price above $800 USD
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reports $2.7B hedge fund 'significant position' in ZEC; privacy-coin narrative is resurging post-SEC clarity; technical setup from current levels is 3-5x upside.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Zcash price may hit $800 as $2.7B hedge fund reveals 'significant position' in ZEC; privacy coin regulatory tailwinds

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Morgan Stanley's E*Trade crypto trading pilot generate >$500M in monthly trading volume by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Morgan Stanley investor earnings call disclosure or SEC 10-Q filing; E*Trade official user/volume metrics if public
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Institutional custody and retail access convergence is narrative-neutral but volume catalysts are underestimated; competitor pressure (Fidelity, Schwab) driving feature races.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Morgan Stanley takes on crypto trading rivals with E*Trade pilot; major financial intermediary commits infrastructure

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Toncoin (TON) market cap exceed Ethereum's market cap by November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap market cap rankings; snapshot on deadline date
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: TON is trending; TON ecosystem (Telegram, payments, RWA onramps via Tonscan/Toncoin bridge) is accelerating; but ETH is entrenched—market is assigning near-zero probability to a reversal.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Crypto trending: Toncoin (TON) listed; Telegram ecosystem expansion; OpenTrade stablecoin infrastructure compatible with TON infrastructure

investment_theses.thesis: Risk-off rally in defensive discretionary (Uber, Disney) will reverse if Fed holds rates above 4.75% through Q3 2026; rotate into tech mega-cap (NVDA, TSM) on AI capex durability.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Uber and Disney surging on resilient consumer spending, but ADP payrolls beat removes near-term rate-cut catalyst
CNBC: AMD's Su doubled long-term CPU demand forecasts; Corning deal validates sustained AI infrastructure capex
Signal: Consumer strength is fragile without rate relief; institutional AI spending is decoupled from consumer health
investment_theses.counter_view: Consumer durability may persist independent of rates if wage growth sustains; Fed could pause or cut pre-emptively if inflation re-emerges.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA calls (6-month duration) / Short Uber or Disney on any >15% outperformance vs SPY; hedge with QQQ vs IYC ratio

investment_theses.thesis: Crypto infrastructure adoption is accelerating faster than traditional finance incumbents can respond; Morgan Stanley's E*Trade pilot is reactive, not proactive—position for TON and stablecoin yield ecosystems to capture retail/enterprise RWA flows.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Morgan Stanley E*Trade pilot, OpenTrade $17M raise, Samsung blockchain securities infrastructure in South Korea
CoinDesk: CoinDesk 20 Index up 2.5%; Hut 8 up 30% on AI data center deal; memecoin liquidity at record levels
36Kr: Chinese fintech (Douban AI, ByteDance Douyin ecosystem) moving into premium subscription tiers; Asia incentivizing stablecoin issuance
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory crackdown (UK BoE unhosted wallet ban, US SEC enforcement) could freeze custody/onramp infrastructure faster than adoption accelerates.
investment_theses.expression: Long TON spot / ETH perp short (200–300x leverage); Long OpenTrade equity (Series B secondary if available); Accumulate USDC/USDT yield strategies; short traditional financial ETFs (XLF, BX)

investment_theses.thesis: Iran peace deal probability is >60% within 8 weeks; oil will trade lower on resolution relief, but equity volatility collapses—energy stocks underperform broad market, but defensive tech (MSFT, AAPL) outperforms.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump administration expects Tehran response within 48 hours on key points
BBC: Oil prices drop and stock markets rise after reports of deal to end Iran war; China calling for Strait reopening signals multilateral support
Signal: Geopolitical risk premium is pricing >50% probability of escalation; peace deal would release this premium instantly
investment_theses.counter_view: Hardliners on either side could derail talks; Trump's rhetorical escalation could trigger Iranian retaliatory action, widening spreads.
investment_theses.expression: Long VIX puts (July 2026 20-strike, 30-delta) / Long energy sector underperformance (XLE vs SPY); Long defensives (MSFT, AAPL) outright or vs XLF

investment_theses.thesis: Zcash (ZEC) will rally on privacy-coin narrative resurgence and confirmed large accumulation; however, regulatory clarity (post-SEC enforcement) will create ceiling at $600–$800 before pullback—take partial profits at $700.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: $2.7B hedge fund 'significant position' in ZEC; Zcash price may hit $800
Crypto trending: ZEC in top 7 by buzz; privacy-coin ecosystem (Monero, Firo) also trending, signaling sector rotation into anon coins
Signal: SEC has de-escalated enforcement on privacy coins post-Gary Gensler; institutional capital testing the waters
investment_theses.counter_view: US/UK/EU could tighten sanctions on privacy-coin exchanges; custody restrictions could trigger a flash crash below $400.
investment_theses.expression: Long ZEC spot with 2/3 exit at $700, 1/3 at $500 stop-loss; or buy $500 call spreads (ZEC/USD Sep 2026, 500/700 strikes)

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin dominance will contract as stablecoin-on-chain liquidity grows (OpenTrade, Samsung infrastructure, Colombia mining); BTC/ETH ratio underperforming signals institutional capital rotating toward Ethereum ecosystem smart contracts and DeFi.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: OpenTrade $17M raise for stablecoin RWA bridges; Samsung SDS blockchain securities system for South Korea
CoinDesk: Consensus Miami Day 2 coverage; memecoin liquidity and parlay odds at record levels (ecosystem capital breadth increasing)
36Kr: Chinese AI fintech (Douban, ByteDance) moving into stablecoin yield infrastructure; regulatory clarity in Asia accelerating adoption
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin narrative (store-of-value, macro hedge) could re-strengthen if recession fears spike; ETH fundamentals (Shanghai upgrades, staking) face technical setbacks.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio (Sep 2026 expiry, target 0.08); Short BTC perps vs Long ETH perps (2:1 notional ratio); Long stablecoin yield protocols (USDC, USDT lending on Aave, Curve)
